current.summary: Built hooks empirical testing framework: 28-check behavior checklist, 21 benchmark hooks in syllago canonical format, dogfood execution plan, and result collection templates. All committed.

activeWork.description: Hooks empirical testing framework — all artifacts written and committed. Ready for empirical execution against real agents.
activeWork.progress: All 17 implementation tasks + final validation complete. 49 files committed (b24411f). /develop workflow used end-to-end: brainstorm → plan → validate → beads → parallel execute.

git.lastCommit: b24411f feat: hooks empirical testing framework — checklist, benchmark hooks, dogfood plan

recentDecisions: Checklist: 28 checks across 9 categories, Dachary-style format (ID + category + what it checks + why it matters + per-agent table)
Benchmark hooks: shell scripts in syllago canonical format (.syllago.yaml + hb-XX.sh), shared log file via $SYLLAGO_BENCHMARK_LOG

Dogfood phases: Phase 1 free agents (Gemini CLI, Cursor, Windsurf, OpenCode, Amazon Q, Cline, Augment, Kiro CLI), Phase 2 paid (Claude Code, VS Code Copilot, Copilot CLI), Phase 3 stretch (Kiro IDE, gptme, Pi)
gptme and Pi moved to stretch (in-process hooks, not bash-compatible); Amazon Q and Augment promoted to Phase 1
Manual checks section added for HB-13, HB-17, HB-22-24, HB-27-28 (non-automatable)
Result log handling: markdown paste-in (no separate .log files)
nextSteps: Install Phase 1 free-tier agents (Gemini CLI, Cursor, Windsurf, etc.) and run benchmark hooks per dogfood plan
Record results in docs/checks/results/<agent-slug>.md using the template
Update checklist UNVERIFIED entries with empirical PASS/FAIL results
File converter bugs if syllago install produces incorrect hook configs for any agent

context.notes: This session used the /develop workflow end-to-end for the first time on a non-code (documentation/content) project. Adapted the bead structure: single beads per task instead of test→impl pairs since there's no code to TDD. Phase B analysis caught 5 real issues in T-16 (dogfood plan) — manual checks missing, result log format mismatch, Gemini format note, HB-17 and HB-13 not addressed. All fixed before execution. The hooks-empirical-testing and hooks-empirical-testing-framework-plan-validated handoffs are now superseded by this one.

previousSessions.summary: Designed hooks empirical testing framework: community checklist, benchmark test scripts, and syllago dogfood plan. Researched agent pricing — 8-10 agents testable for free.
completedWork: Research phase COMPLETE — all hooks behavior data validated (14 files, ~2,400 lines)
Pricing research COMPLETE — 12 agents identified, 8-10 free tier
Three artifacts scoped: checklist, benchmark hooks, dogfood plan
